title: Cover Module. In 'Ecological Field Monitoring Protocols Manual using the Ecological Monitoring System Australia'
author: Laws, Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This module is one of many that form the  Ecological Field Monitoring Protocols Manual  using the  Ecological Monitoring System Australia (EMSA),  available at  https://emsa.tern.org.au/documents . The Cover Module records quantitative, accurate and repeatable measures of vegetation and substrate cover within the plot, using the point-intercept method. 
 This module includes two protocols for recording cover within the plot: 
 
 Enhanced protocol – cover recorded from 1010 point-intercepts across the plot for all intercepts from the ground to the canopy, including substrate, species, growth form and height. 
 Standard protocol – fractional cover recorded from 404 point-intercepts across the plot for all intercepts from the ground to the canopy, including substrate, photosynthetic and non-photosynthetic vegetation, and height.
